category_sources: Official homepage says Flake is an open-source FLAC audio encoder and independent implementation of the FLAC specification.
source_facts.description says Flake is a FLAC audio encoder.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Flake: FLAC Encoder.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best available documentation surface and links to documentation, download, benchmarks, and project information.
repo_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge release information provide source archives, but no official source-control URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists command-line encoder frontend, libflake library, fast encoding, and FLAC compression modes.
